name: Garbanzo Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the stock and garbanzo beans. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, covered, for 1 hour, or until just tender. Drain, reserving 1 cup of the cooking liquid.
2. In another large saucepan, combine the cooked garbanzos, reserved liquid, onion, tomato, ginger, coriander, garlic, and cumin. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
3. Season to taste with freshly ground black pepper.
4. Garnish with lime juice and chopped parsley.
